{{Event Header|StS2 Spiraling Whirlpool.png}} {{E|Spiraling Whirlpool|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Underdocks}}. == Options == {{Frame|Observe}} {{TS|positive||{{KW|Enchant||2}} a Basic {{C|Strike (Ironclad)|Strike|2}} or {{C|Defend (Ironclad)|Defend|2}} with {{KW|Spiral||2}}.}}
{{Frame|Drink}} {{TS|positive||Heal 33% of Max HP.}} == Conditions == * Only appears if you have at least 1 card that can be enchanted with Spiral (Strike or Defend cards). == Dialogue ==
You happen upon a Massive Spiraling Whirlpool. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns. Around and around... around... ....and around.... what a sight...... What do you do?
{{Frame|Observe}}
...ah- so beautiful..... So it spins... still spinning around. Yes... Oh! Was that..... a little splash...? ....of course. You deserve some fun, too Mr. Spiral... haha... ... ....... ... It's time to go now. You whisper something as you take your leave. "Thank you, Spiral."
{{Frame|Drink}}
You cup your hands and dip it into the Spiraling Whirlpool. Its waters fill your hands at a gentle rate as you take small sips with your eyes closed. Delicious water spirals through you to your Center, washing away harmful thoughts and physical ailments...
